chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8120 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.3329/2024 2. For hearing on CMA No.24273/2022 3. For hearing of main case 27.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Shafique Mughal, advocate for respondent No.4 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector SAPT Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Present petition seeks issuance of writ against a private respondent which could not be entertained within the ambit of Article 199 of Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
